description: Production crash affecting all users — p1:high must actually land on the issue, not silently no-op via unknownInRepo.

issue.title: [Bug] oRPC procedures throw on every call after latest migration
issue.body:
## Steps to reproduce

1. Pull latest main.
2. Run `pnpm db:migrate`.
3. Call any oRPC procedure from the renderer.
4. Observe: every procedure throws `DrizzleError: relation 'users' does not exist`.

## Expected behavior

Procedures work after migration.

## Actual behavior

Every procedure throws. Affects all users on all platforms. Reproduced on macOS 14.4, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04.

## Environment

- `packages/api/`
- Latest commit on `main`
- pnpm 9 / Node 24

expected.rationale: Production-down across all platforms — p1 by definition.
